approval_basis: Explicit AMTECH human-operator directives requiring computation before patching, repository-wide document consolidation, separation of candidate topology from software-invariant topology, equal-feasibility controls, sensitivity analysis, and separation of selection influence from causal improvement.

clauses.change: Places the simple evidence-and-invariants baseline, split topology, equal-feasibility controls, and sensitivity before implementation compression.
Raises T3 search robustness to at least 1,000 feasible random baselines, 32 search restarts, and 32 weight perturbations.
Separates candidate search topology from software-invariant topology and forbids candidate-edge coverage from representing software completion.
Requires every control to use one feasible domain and makes mandatory coverage a constraint rather than an objective reward.
Distinguishes selection influence from causal improvement and requires independent implementation outcomes for causal promotion.
Disables predictive latent models when they do not beat a simple baseline and prohibits unimplemented COCONUT/continuous-thought claims.
Requires every selected software-invariant hyperedge to map to complete behavioral proof or an explicit blocker.
Consolidates contributor policy into one root contract, one product contract, compatibility routers, and one exact product-status owner.
Removes transient release status from normative and compatibility mirrors; exact status is owned by mvp-build/CODEGRAPH.md and exact workflow/release evidence.

open_gates: exact-head trace governance source unit integration type lint build
target host runtime and typed server composition
fixture-free browser channel and golden work
recovery rollback telemetry and signed release
accessibility capacity pilot deployment and production
